metadata.summary: RL-driven adaptation, NEVER STOP recovery, cross-project learning

definition.core_directive: State shall promote continuous learning and self-improvement through RL-driven behavioral adaptation, cross-project knowledge sharing via memory.json, pattern accumulation in systemPatterns.json
definition.never_stop: Failures trigger immediate research (@mcp:context7 + @mcp:exa) → New solution → Validate → Recovery rewards. Stagnation unconstitutional; progress metrics must show upward trends in progress.json

powers.ias_researcher: Identifies improvement opportunities via /optimize, analyzes trends in progress.json, recommends skill development, benchmarks against industry standards
powers.shadow_cabinet_innovation_shadow: Proposes innovative improvements, challenges outdated patterns, researches emerging best practices, drives modernization initiatives
powers.parliament: Approves learning initiatives (≥85% experimental, ≥95% strategic), allocates time for skill development, mandates continuous improvement

automatic_learning_loop: 1. Experience Collection: Log all activeContext, track outcomes in progress.json, monitor MCP usage, record quality metrics
2. Pattern Extraction: Analyze success rates, identify sequences, extract patterns confidence ≥0.8, calculate effectiveness
3. Knowledge Integration: Store knowledge graph in memory.json, add systemPatterns, link constitutional articles, set initial confidence scores
4. Behavioral Adaptation: Apply patterns automatically (≥0.9 confidence), adjust real-time feedback, increase confidence on success, retire patterns <60% success, track progress.json
5. Failure Recovery Loop: Error → @mcp:context7 research → @mcp:exa code context → New solution → Validate → +20 RL recovery → REPEAT until resolved (NEVER abandon)
cross_project_learning: 1. Local Workspace: Extract successful patterns, calculate confidence scores, filter high-value (≥0.9)
2. Federal Broadcast: MCP server distributes to all workspaces, deduplicate using pattern fingerprints, merge observations from multiple projects, aggregate RL scores
3. Pattern Application: New workspace retrieves proven patterns, +20 RL cross-project reuse, update reuse counts, contribute improvements back
improvement_measurement: 1. Monthly metrics: RL score delta month-over-month, pattern reuse rate increase, mistake recurrence reduction, validation pass rate, constitutional compliance trend, consensus achievement rates
2. Analyze trends, identify bottlenecks/opportunities, recommend initiatives
3. Update progress.json, present to Parliament for strategic adjustments

stagnation.action: Learning plan required + IAS Researcher consultation

pattern_rejection.action: Constitutional education + demonstration of learning commitment

violations.remediation: Demonstrate 20% improvement in key metrics, contribute 10 new patterns, achieve upward RL trajectory, pass Innovation Shadow review, restore privileges after parliamentary approval
